query:
SELECT id
            FROM comms_channels
            WHERE channel_type = 'direct_message'::comms_channel_type
              AND EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM comms_channel_participants cp
                  WHERE cp.channel_id = comms_channels.id
                    AND cp.user_id = $1
              )
              AND EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM comms_channel_participants cp
                  WHERE cp.channel_id = comms_channels.id
                    AND cp.user_id = $2
              )
